subheadline: Field notes from the people who build TYPO3 sites in days, not months — theming, seeding, and the workflows that make it possible.

posts.title: We repainted 255 elements with one click. Here's how.
posts.excerpt: OKLCH tokens and semantic CSS variables let a single site setting reskin every Desiderio element at runtime. Your next redesign could be a settings change, not a project.

image.title: Desiderio site settings theme category
image.alternative: TYPO3 site settings module showing the Desiderio theme category with preset, density, and radius options.
image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.

posts.title: Backend previews for every element — your editors will notice
posts.excerpt: All 255 Desiderio Content Blocks render a real preview in the page module. The result: fewer support tickets, faster onboarding, happier editors.

image.title: Desiderio page module previews
image.alternative: TYPO3 page module showing Desiderio content elements with rendered backend previews.
image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.

posts.title: A full demo site in one command — pitch tomorrow, not next month
posts.excerpt: desiderio:styleguide:seed builds the entire styleguide, workspaces-safe and idempotent. Show a client a finished-looking site before the kickoff meeting ends.

image.title: Desiderio new content element wizard
image.alternative: TYPO3 new content element wizard listing all ten Desiderio element groups.
image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.
